2275370.name: Static Mag
2275370.description:
Static Mag is a sci-fi FPS that takes place on the highest floors of skyscrapers. You don't carry extra ammo or weapons, but you do have a magnet.

The Magnet
Use your magnet to steal weapons from enemies and enhance your movement.

Parkour
Run on walls, climb up surfaces, and crash through windows to get to your destination.

Combat
Experience fast paced and difficult combat against a variety of enemies that offer unique mechanics.
2275370.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
